channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 12th March
item.description:
CWPH STATS REQUIRED AROUND IRONWORKS 2 WAY STOP AND GO 1000 X 400 X 75mm MARKED (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Signs & Street Furniture problem, 12th March
item.description:
Sign in hedge/verge Remove Sign to make safe 1 Standard TM (Damaged Sign Post)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: On roundabout, 12th March
item.description:
Big area of surface damage
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmbridge Court Roundabout, Elmbridge, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Post or sign leaning slightly (less than 20 degrees) problem, 12th March
item.description:
Temporary road sign (triangular) has caught a vehicle resulting in damage as it was protruding into the road.
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Post or sign leaning slightly (less than 20 degrees)

item.title: Large pothole on busy T junction, 12th March
item.description:
You cannot miss it, Cars are swerving around it and into oncoming vehicles or vehicles turm#ning out of adjacent T junction.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Badgeworth Road, Badgeworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
